```json
        "Human will and life are controllable by a divine entity.",
        "Understanding or relationship with God varies among individuals.",
        "Surrendering control can lead to spiritual or practical benefits."
    ],
    "coherence_assessment": "The statement is internally coherent as it aligns with common spiritual practices of surrender and trust in a higher power that is perceived to have a benevolent interest in human lives.",
    "conditions_for_usefulness": "The statement can be useful if individuals believe in a caring higher power, find comfort in relinquishing control, and perceive positive outcomes from a spiritual approach to life.",

}
```
